text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: We're ready, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get started, you two! Reaaady...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
YAAAAA!
RAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wooow! You're both really, reeeallly fast! Well, you are my sisters after all!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you think so too, right, Trainer? Worthy of
being scouted, wouldn't you say?
choice_data_list: They're not race-ready yet, so I can't say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being "race-ready" refers to a period of growth
when an Umamusume's abilities increase
dramatically. It's also when most enter a contract
with a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You're as serious as ever, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But, well... I guess it's thanks to that
straight-laced nature of yours that I've been able
to come this far.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You always were too much of a worrywart,
Trainer. You even went and brought over a
stretcher when I collapsed at the Asahi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You went above and beyond to look
out for me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I've been able to get to where I
am today without suffering any major injuries.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So when my sisters make it into Tracen Academy,
I'd be mighty relieved if you were the one to
guide them.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it's still too early to say whether they'll
actually enroll or not. They might both be chasing
completely different dreams by next year.
choice_data_list: We'll have to see when the time comes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Big Sis!
We wanna race against you next!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll need you to start us off!
choice_data_list: You sure you'll be able to hold back?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha, well...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Not a chance! I'm gonna run at full power!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Big Sis is too fast...
Time out!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I need a breather myself... That
hundred-meter handicap is pretty rough.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, hey! Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Bright and Dober! And...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ines! Oh, and you're with your sisters!
Long time no see!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Hello.
It's Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you two have grown even bigger since last
time. Your leg muscles are becoming strong like
your sister's.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Are you three going out somewhere together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep. We're heading over to the racecourse
museum. And later, we'll stop by the gym so I can
take a quick look at everyone's form.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Ryan! It's like you've become an instructor!
Your aura is practically glowing right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, quit it with the praise, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I wouldn't go so far as to call myself an instructor, but I have been thinking it'd be good to share my knowledge with others!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Each generation is replaced by the next in due
course. Our racing careers are no different,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There'll come a time when each and every one of
us'll have to step away from the turf. So at the
very least...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I want to turn my spirit into energy that will fuel
the next generation of racers!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez... You really are cool, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't you want to do the same for your
sisters, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Well...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I don't think I'd go that far.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to shower them with all the love I can, but I
won't give up my racing spirit.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm pretty selfish, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I see. I guess that's another difference
between us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Later then, Ines. Let's meet again on the track
someday!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Sorry Cassie, Polly.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Your big sis probably won't be a great role model
for you if you decide to enter the world of racing.

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: No big deal!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Right. That's not your style anyway. And besides...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: You'll become our rival instead, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: You did just go all out against them.
You did just go all out against them.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, good point. Playing the role of rival...
That I can do!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've decided! Trainer, let's do some special
training tonight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Not a problem for you, right? You have to keep
guiding me on the path to becoming the mightiest
racer from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cause after all... you are my trainer!
